headline: Dow Jones Futures: Stock Market Rebounds To Highs; Tesla, These Five AI Plays Are At Buy Points

headline: GE Vernova Hydropower Win Highlights India Storage And Grid Reliability Theme
summary: GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) has secured an order to supply nine 150 MW pumped storage hydropower units for one of India’s largest hydropower projects. The project centers on large scale energy storage to support integration of renewable generation into India’s power grid. GE Vernova focuses on power, wind and electrification technologies, and this Indian pumped storage order adds another major project to its global portfolio. Large hydropower and storage projects are one way grids are responding...

headline: Will GE Vernova, MercadoLibre, or NVR Be the Next Big Stock Split?
summary: Wall Street is rediscovering the stock split playbook. In May 2026, KLA (NASDAQ: KLAC) announced a 10-for-1 forward stock split alongside a fiscal Q3 earnings beat and a roughly 21% dividend hike, with shares trading in the $1,800 range. Earlier this year, Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) completed a 25-for-1 split announced in February 2026, bringing ... Will GE Vernova, MercadoLibre, or NVR Be the Next Big Stock Split?
